post.writtenIn: This post is written in Korean.
post.authorBio: A 40-something PM returns to code. Learning, failing, and growing.

about.tagline: I'm a 40-something PM returning to code.
about.para1: Ten years ago, I was a developer writing code every day. But as my career progressed, I naturally moved into product planning and management (PM), and before I knew it, Excel and PowerPoint had become more familiar than any code editor.
about.para2: But recently, watching the rise of generative AI and coding assistants, my heart started beating again. Now that the barrier to building has never been lower — all you need is an idea — I made the decision to "go back and build things myself."
about.whyContent: This blog is my rehabilitation center and journal. It captures development through the lens of a PM, coding alongside AI, and the honest feelings along the way.
